arguments.argument:
event_inherited() image_xscale=1.75; image_yscale=1.75 bActive=true bCanDealDamage=false
//Enemy base statistics eName="Abomination" if global.modeWahfuu=1 {eName="Wahfuu"} eLevel=39 maxLife=1000000 life=maxLife atkPower=12 for(i=0;i<6;i+=1) { resType[i]=1 } stunResist=50 affiliation=9 bIsBoss=true bNoBonus=true
